parents.subject: LU-7376 tests: sanity-hsm/59 should skip old servers.

commit.subject: LU-6941 mdc: debug patch
commit.message:
LU-6941 mdc: debug patch

debug patch to collect more debug logs.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=zfs \
mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs clientdistro=el6.6 \
ossdistro=el6.6 mdsdistro=el6.6 mdtcount=1 mdscount=1 nettypes=o2ib \
testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity testgroup=review-zfs

Change-Id: I267cc7174b3bd09323162c91420328b79f909b4f
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
